title: new-parent-slug-broken: jjf new --parent rejects slugs (must use 7-hex id)
body:
# Goal

Fix `jjf new --parent <slug>` to accept slugs the same way every
other `--parent`-taking verb does (`jjf ls`, `jjf ready`,
`jjf search` all resolve slug or 7-hex via the v2.1 resolver).

# Repro

```
$ jjf new -t "test" --type feature --slug demo --parent agent-ergonomics -F /dev/null
{"ok":false,"error":{"kind":"bad_id","message":"invalid issue id for --dep \"--parent agent-ergonomics\": issue id must be 7 chars, got 16",...}}
```

Workaround: pass the 7-hex id (`--parent 5a755ec`) instead of
the slug.

# Source

The bug is in `run_new` at `crates/jjf/src/main.rs:2107-2114`.
The `--parent` plumbing (added in fj#3, "new-dep-kinds") calls
`IssueId::parse(&raw)` directly on the value, which only accepts
7-char hex. The `resolve_handle(&storage, &handle)` resolver
used by `run_ls` / `run_ready` / `run_search` (added in the
2026-06-28 drop-epic-label work) isn't called here.

Surfaced 2026-06-28 while filing follow-up tickets from the
final whole-branch review of the drop-epic-label feature —
trying to use `--parent agent-ergonomics` failed.

Note: the migration script
(`experiments/drop-epic-labels/run.sh`) was unaffected because
it called `jjf dep add --kind parent-child <child> <epic-id>`
with pre-resolved 7-hex ids from a JSON catalog, not slugs.

# Fix

In `run_new`, replace the direct `IssueId::parse(&raw)` call
with `resolve_handle(&storage, &raw)?` — same call shape the
other verbs use. Requires that `Storage` is opened before the
dep-parsing block (the current order opens storage AFTER
parsing), so the fix may include a reorder of the preflight
steps OR a deferred resolution.

# Acceptance

- [ ] `jjf new -t "x" --parent <slug> -F /dev/null` succeeds with
      a `parent-child` edge to the resolved id.
- [ ] `jjf new -t "x" --parent <7-hex-id> -F /dev/null` still
      succeeds (the existing path).
- [ ] `jjf new -t "x" --parent no-such-slug -F /dev/null` exits
      2 with `slug_not_found`.
- [ ] New CLI integration test in `crates/jjf/tests/new.rs`
      pinning the slug-resolution path.
